entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-anchor
entries.intent: Set or clear the focus anchor that keeps Claude on task across every turn

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-auto
entries.intent: Autonomous project execution loop that runs until completion or block

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-backlog
entries.intent: /pm:backlog — Backlog Management

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-budget
entries.intent: Cap the number of tool calls allowed for the current task; nudges Claude at 80% and 120%

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-checkpoint
entries.intent: Save or restore project state checkpoints

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-debug
entries.intent: Inspect or repair project state files and caches

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-delegate
entries.intent: Delegate a task to a specific specialized agent

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-done-when
entries.intent: Declare the binary-testable criteria Claude must verify before the session may end

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-drift
entries.intent: Audit the breadcrumb trail for scope drift, over-engineering, and criterion advancement

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-focus
entries.intent: Narrow execution scope to a specific phase, epic, or story

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-handoff
entries.intent: Snapshot active task state for post-/compact resume, or display the current handoff

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-init
entries.intent: 8-phase interview-first project initialization with micro-task decomposition

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-integrate
entries.intent: Connect an external PM platform (Jira, Linear, Notion, Asana, Trello, ClickUp, Monday, Todoist, GitHub)

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-next
entries.intent: Show next actionable tasks based on dependencies and priority

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-plan
entries.intent: Recursive task decomposition from phases to stories to micro-tasks (5-15 min)

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-report
entries.intent: Generate a full project report with progress, risks, and artifacts

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-research
entries.intent: Run deep research protocol for a specific task using codebase, Perplexity, Context7, and Firecrawl sources

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-retrospective
entries.intent: Post-completion retrospective analysis with lessons learned

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-review
entries.intent: Multi-agent quality council review of completed work

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-risk
entries.intent: Assess project risks with severity scoring and mitigation suggestions

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-scope
entries.intent: Manage the file/command allowlist that blocks out-of-scope edits during the active task

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-status
entries.intent: ASCII progress dashboard for the active project

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-sync
entries.intent: Bidirectional sync between local project state and integrated PM platform

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-task
entries.intent: /pm:task — Task Management CRUD

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-template
entries.intent: Use or create reusable project templates (webapp, api-service, ml-pipeline, mobile-app, infrastructure)

entries.name: project-management-plugin:pm-work
entries.intent: /pm:work — Research-First Task Execution
